## Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Results Namespace

| :--- | :--- |
| [DomainResult](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Results.DomainResult.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Results\.DomainResult') | Wraps the result of a domain service command processing\. Contains an immutable list of [IEventPayload](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Events.IEventPayload.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Events\.IEventPayload') instances representing success events, rejection events, or no\-op\. Mixed results \(both regular and rejection events\) are invalid and rejected at construction\. |
